content:
🔥 SpreadPaper | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: To allow users to set a single, high-resolution image as a wallpaper that spans across multiple monitors on macOS, providing a unified and visually appealing desktop background.
✨ Key Features: • Visual Positioning • Live Preview • Flip & Scale • Save Presets • Multi-Monitor Smart Detection
📖 Summary: SpreadPaper is a native macOS application designed to seamlessly spread a single high-resolution wallpaper across multiple connected monitors. It offers a user-friendly interface for positioning, scaling, and flipping images to create a cohesive desktop aesthetic, overcoming the limitations of macOS's default wallpaper handling for multi-display setups.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
